title: AliHealth's Hydrogen Ion Has Collected Three Leading Medical Journals, Becoming the First Medical AI Platform in China to Obtain Full Text Authorization from NEJM, JAMA, and BMJ
excerpt: The AliHealth Medical AI platform "Hydrogen Ion" has recently reached content collaboration agreements with NEJM Group (publisher of The New England Journal of
content_html:
The AliHealth Medical AI platform "Hydrogen Ion" has recently reached content collaboration agreements with NEJM Group (publisher of The New England Journal of Medicine), JAMA (Journal of the American Medical Association) and JAMA Network. Adding to its previous agreement with BMJ Group (British Medical Journal), Hydrogen Ion has now become the first medical AI platform in China to have full-text content authorization from the world's three top medical journals.

This progress has occurred just two months after its May product launch. At that time, Hydrogen Ion defined its collaboration with BMJ as the "starting point of cooperation with international top-tier journals." Now, with NEJM and JAMA being signed on, it indicates that AliHealth's strategic layout on top medical evidence is rapidly materializing.

For a long time, Chinese doctors have faced multiple barriers in accessing global cutting-edge medical evidence: high costs for accessing top-tier literature, high language barriers, and low search efficiency. For example, when searching for the subgroup efficacy of an immunotherapy regimen, PubMed typically only provides abstracts, full texts require paid access, and users must search across multiple journals separately, with the entire process possibly taking half a day.

Currently, the cooperation with the three publishing groups covers almost all core evidence resources across clinical disciplines. Academic content and multimedia resources from 70 medical journals under the BMJ Group published in the past ten years, all publications and multimedia resources from the NEJM Group since 1990, and all published content and multimedia resources from JAMA and JAMA Network have been integrated into the Hydrogen Ion platform.

Doctors can directly read full texts of top-tier journal articles on Hydrogen Ion, or obtain evidence-based answers through AI Q&A. All references can be traced back to the original passages and support bilingual reading. The traditional "man searches for literature" model is evolving toward "AI + evidence reasoning." The continuous investment of Hydrogen Ion in international top medical journals essentially aims to build an evidence-based AI infrastructure for Chinese doctors.

Shen Difan, Chairman and CEO of AliHealth, stated during the signing, "Doctors are the core pillars of the healthcare system and also a group facing multiple professional pressures." The mission of Hydrogen Ion is to help doctors solve all medical problems. Continuously collaborating with international medical journals is about deeply integrating global top medical evidence with AI capabilities, using natural conversation interaction to intuitively, quickly, and accurately assist in answering clinical and research challenges, providing Chinese doctors with more reliable decision-making support.

sentences.zh: 所有参考文献均可追溯到原文段落，并支持双语阅读。

sentences.en: The mission of Hydrogen Ion is to help doctors solve all medical problems.
sentences.zh: 氢离子的使命是帮助医生解决所有医疗问题。

sentences.en: Continuously collaborating with international medical journals is about deeply integrating global top medical evidence with AI capabilities, using natural conversation interaction to intuitively, quickly, and accurately assist in answering clinical and research challenges, providing Chinese doctors with more reliable decision-making support.
sentences.zh: 持续与国际医学期刊合作，将全球顶尖医学证据与人工智能能力深度融合，利用自然对话交互直观、快速、准确地协助解答临床和研究挑战，为中国医生提供更可靠的决策支持。

content_html_zh:
阿里健康医疗AI平台“氢离子”近日与NEJM集团（《新英格兰医学杂志》出版商）、JAMA（美国医学会杂志）、JAMA Network达成内容合作协议。 加上此前与BMJ集团（英国医学杂志）的合作，Hydrogen Ion现已成为国内首家获得全球三大顶级医学期刊全文内容授权的医疗AI平台。

这一进展发生在 5 月份产品推出仅两个月后。 当时，Hydrogen Ion 将与 BMJ 的合作定义为“与国际顶级期刊合作的起点”。 如今，《NEJM》和《JAMA》的签约，标志着阿里健康在顶级医学证据上的战略布局正在迅速落地。

长期以来，中国医生获取全球前沿医学证据面临多重障碍：获取顶级文献成本高、语言障碍高、检索效率低。 例如，在搜索免疫治疗方案的亚组疗效时，PubMed 通常只提供摘要，全文需要付费访问，用户必须分别搜索多个期刊，整个过程可能需要半天时间。

目前，与三大出版集团的合作涵盖了几乎所有临床学科的核心证据资源。 BMJ集团旗下70种医学期刊过去十年出版的学术内容和多媒体资源、NEJM集团自1990年以来的所有出版物和多媒体资源、以及JAMA和JAMA Network的所有出版内容和多媒体资源都已集成到Hydrogen Ion平台中。

医生可以直接阅读氢离子顶级期刊文章全文，或通过AI问答获得循证答案。 所有参考文献均可追溯到原文段落，并支持双语阅读。 传统的“人寻文献”模式正在向“人工智能+证据推理”演变。 氢离子在国际顶级医学期刊上的持续投入，本质上是为了为中国医生构建循证的人工智能基础设施。

阿里健康董事长兼首席执行官沉涤凡在签约时表示，“医生是医疗体系的核心支柱，也是面临多重职业压力的群体。” 氢离子的使命是帮助医生解决所有医疗问题。 持续与国际医学期刊合作，将全球顶尖医学证据与人工智能能力深度融合，利用自然对话交互直观、快速、准确地协助解答临床和研究挑战，为中国医生提供更可靠的决策支持。
